prompt: [PROMPT: COMPLEX DYNAMIC WHITENED ISOMETRIC ILLUSTRATION] A clean, sophisticated isometric 3D vector illustration in the 'Whitened Dynamic Conceptual' style. A two-story house shown in isometric cross-section view. Each room contains one matte black silhouette figure, and each figure has a glowing device beside them — representing four devices transforming simultaneously during a family preparation day. LIVING ROOM (ground floor, large): A TV screen with Orange #F59400 frame displays a project map overview. A matte black silhouette adult figure stands nearby. ENTRANCE AREA (ground floor): A matte black silhouette adult figure (Kenji) holds a smartphone with Blue #6C82FE screen showing a dashboard interface. UPSTAIRS ROOM 1: A matte black silhouette child figure (Ren, 10) next to a tablet with Pink #FC6978 screen showing a mission-style progress bar interface. UPSTAIRS ROOM 2: A smaller matte black silhouette child figure (Hana, 7) next to a tablet with Orange #F59400 screen showing a simple checklist with large icons. In the CENTER of the house, a Google Home Speaker icon (Blue #6C82FE) emits concentric ripple waves, representing voice UI radiating through the home. Thin dashed lines connect all four devices to each other and to the central speaker — data flow visualization. Each room shows a small progress bar (0% to partially filled). The house structure uses White #FFFFFF walls and floors extensively for the 'whitened' aesthetic. All outlines are clean, uniform-weight matte black #111111. The entire composition sits on expansive Light Gray #EEEEEE background with generous negative space around the house for airiness. Soft-cell shading. Strategic use of Element White on building faces.
negative_prompt: realistic rendering, photorealistic, gradients, textured outlines, decorative objects, chess pieces, dice, coins, dark background, cluttered, shadows on background, 3D engine photorealism, Blender, soft outlines, realistic people
